description: Refactor src/ExecutionProxy.sol to a pure Weiroll VM executor per FR-11. Remove Ownable, EIP712, ECDSA, ReentrancyGuard, fee state (feeRecipient, defaultFeeBps, feeSigner, MAX_FEE_BPS, FEE_OVERRIDE_TYPEHASH), slippage OutputSpec struct, rescue function, fee admin setters, all fee-related events/errors, and the current execute()/executeSingle() entry points. Replace with a single executePath(bytes32[] commands, bytes[] state) matching IExecutor. Keep VM inheritance, NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL (in case helpers rely on it), and receive()/fallback() so ETH can be forwarded from Router. No storage variables. No admin functions. The contract becomes the smallest possible arbitrary-execution surface for audit.
commit: refactor(execution-proxy): reduce to pure Weiroll VM executor
steps: Strip imports in src/ExecutionProxy.sol down to: @openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol (if still needed), @weiroll/VM.sol, and src/interfaces/IExecutor.sol. Remove Ownable, EIP712, ECDSA, ReentrancyGuard, SafeERC20 imports.
Change inheritance to `contract ExecutionProxy is VM, IExecutor` and drop the constructor (contract becomes stateless; remove all constructor args).

Delete OutputSpec struct, Executed/DefaultFeeBpsUpdated/FeeRecipientUpdated/FeeSignerUpdated events, SlippageExceeded/NoOutputsSpecified/InvalidFeeSignature/FeeExceedsMax/FeeSignatureExpired errors, feeRecipient/defaultFeeBps/feeSigner storage, MAX_FEE_BPS and FEE_OVERRIDE_TYPEHASH constants, the execute()/executeSingle() entry points, rescue(), setDefaultFeeBps()/setFeeRecipient()/setFeeSigner() setters, and the internal helpers _resolveFeeBps/_transferOutput/_getBalance/_getBalanceBefore.
Add `function executePath(bytes32[] calldata commands, bytes[] calldata state) external payable override { _execute(commands, state); }` as the sole entry point.
Keep ETHTransferFailed error only if still referenced; otherwise delete. Keep `receive() external payable {}` and `fallback() external payable {}` so Router can forward ETH value.
Run `forge fmt` and `forge build`. Existing tests in test/ExecutionProxy.t.sol will not compile at this step -- that is expected and is handled by INF-0003.
acceptance_criteria: [auto] `forge build --skip test` compiles src/ExecutionProxy.sol with zero errors.
[auto] grep -n 'function executePath(bytes32\[\] calldata commands, bytes\[\] calldata state) external payable' src/ExecutionProxy.sol matches exactly one line.
[auto] grep -n 'function execute(\|function executeSingle(' src/ExecutionProxy.sol returns zero matches.
[auto] `forge inspect ExecutionProxy storage-layout` prints an empty storage layout.
[auto] `forge inspect ExecutionProxy bytecode | wc -c` returns a byte count below 12000 (chars in hex); proves the audit-surface bound from FR-11.
[manual] Contract still inherits Weiroll VM and implements IExecutor; no admin functions, no constructor.
[manual] receive() and fallback() remain payable so Router.call{value:}(executePath(...)) can forward native ETH.
